Off Calendar Jul-26-2010 Continued To Aug-02-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 604

Hearing On Ex-Parte Application For Entry Of Judgment Purs To Stipulation (Ccp 664.6)
Off Calendar Jul-19-2010 Continued To Jul-26-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 604

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-30-2010 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Don Sullivan; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Annie Cheng, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation.
Attorney, John P. Zanghi representing the plaintiff.

Defendants, Yehleen Habitan and Luis Contreras are present.
Attorney, Elisabeth Derby representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 3101 21st Street #201, San Francisco, California.

This case settled, the trial date of APR-05-2010 is vacated.
